page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Girlfriend of Steel Memorial Book
text:
is a book for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by ASCII on 01 June 1998. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4757201141 

Overview

The story summary, characters, mecha, and stage information is available in this book. Comes with a poster drawn by the artists of GAINAX.
